title: mentha portavellae
intro: Mentha portavellae, also known as Rock Mint or Portuguese Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, astringent, and antiseptic agent, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mentha portavellae include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, thereby protecting against infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
